html:
Exclusive to:

Characters can sit on it and also do Emotes while sitting:

  • /happy
  • /angry
  • /no (/annoyed)
  • /facepalm
  • /kiss
  • /rude
  • /cry (/sad)
  • /wave
  • /toast
  • /flex
  • /laugh
  • /sleepy
  • /fistshake


Pearl also can sit on it, if it is on Pearl's territory.

Contents

  • 1 Wooden Chair Stool
  • 2 Stone Chair and Stool
  • 3 Sanctum Relic
  • 4 Skins
    • 4.1 Wooden Chair Skins
    • 4.2 Wooden Stool Skins
    • 4.3 Stone Chair Skins
    • 4.4 Stone Stool Skins
  • 5 Trivia
  • 6 Assets
  • 7 Gallery

Wooden Chair Stool

EmptyOccupiedBurnt

The Wooden Chair and Wooden Stool are craftable Structures exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced within the From Beyond updates. They can be crafted in the Decorations Filter with 1 Boards and require a Sawhorse to prototype.

Stone Chair and Stool

The Stone Chair and Stone Stool are craftable Structures exclusive to Don't Starve Together. They can be crafted with 1 Cut Stone and 2 Rope and require an upgraded Sawhorse with Moon Glass Saw Blade to prototype.

Sanctum Relic

The Sanctum Relic as a stool can be found in a Playbill room in the Sanctum.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

Trivia

  • The Wooden Chair and Wooden Stool were introduced in the Host of Horrors update.
  • If the chair you are sitting on lights up, your character will say “This is fine.” Some characters say this line differently, but for the most part they are the same. This is a reference to a popular comic strip from the webcomic Gunshow.

"A wooden chair to sit on."
"A wooden stool to sit on."

EmptyOccupiedBurnt
“I'd like to sit on that!”
–Wilson, when examining an empty Wooden Chair/Stool
“That will definitely burn.”
–Willow, when examining an empty Wooden Chair/Stool
“Is tiny chair strong enough to hold Wolfgang?”
–Wolfgang, when examining an empty Wooden Chair/Stool
“Abigail?”
–Wendy, when examining an empty Wooden Chair/Stool
“MY CHAIR”
–WX-78, when examining an empty Wooden Chair/Stool
“Reminds me of the chair in my reading nook.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining an empty Wooden Chair/Stool
“Just look at that quality woodworking!”
–Woodie, when examining an empty Wooden Chair/Stool
“I'm appalled by the idea of sitting for some reason.”
–Maxwell, when examining an empty Wooden Chair/Stool
“A warriör döth nöt sit.”
–Wigfrid, when examining an empty Wooden Chair/Stool
“Mother said I could never sit still.”
–Webber, when examining an empty Wooden Chair/Stool
“Mon chair.”
–Warly, when examining an empty Wooden Chair/Stool
“Sit Place”
–Wormwood, when examining an empty Wooden Chair/Stool
“Looks sturdy enough.”
–Winona, when examining an empty Wooden Chair/Stool
“I'll take a seat and rest my feet.”
–Wortox, when examining an empty Wooden Chair/Stool
“Oooh, fancy sitting-place!”
–Wurt, when examining an empty Wooden Chair/Stool
“Sorry Woby, that's not for you.”
–Walter, when examining an empty Wooden Chair/Stool
“I believe in my time, we called that a chair.”
–Wanda, when examining an empty Wooden Chair/Stool
“Somebody else is sitting on that.”
–Wilson, when examining a occupied Wooden Chair/Stool
“You sure you want to sit there? That chair may spontaneously combust.”
–Willow, when examining a occupied Wooden Chair/Stool
“Do not worry, friend. Wolfgang will stand.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a occupied Wooden Chair/Stool
“You might be sitting on Abigail.”
–Wendy, when examining a occupied Wooden Chair/Stool
“I WAS GOING TO SIT THERE”
–WX-78, when examining a occupied Wooden Chair/Stool
“If you're going to sit, you might as well read.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a occupied Wooden Chair/Stool
“They're takin' a load off, eh?”
–Woodie, when examining a occupied Wooden Chair/Stool
“Good. You sit. Forever.”
–Maxwell, when examining a occupied Wooden Chair/Stool
“Ön yöur feet, söldier!”
–Wigfrid, when examining a occupied Wooden Chair/Stool
“Mother said I could never sit still.”
–Webber, when examining a occupied Wooden Chair/Stool
“Leur chair.”
–Warly, when examining a occupied Wooden Chair/Stool
“That okay! Will sit somewhere else”
–Wormwood, when examining a occupied Wooden Chair/Stool
“Looks like that seat's spoken for.”
–Winona, when examining a occupied Wooden Chair/Stool
“Move your rear, I want to sit here!”
–Wortox, when examining a occupied Wooden Chair/Stool
“Wanna turn! Move over!”
–Wurt, when examining a occupied Wooden Chair/Stool
“Sorry Woby, that's not for you.”
–Walter, when examining a occupied Wooden Chair/Stool
“It is occupied.”
–Wanda, when examining a occupied Wooden Chair/Stool
“I wouldn't like to sit on that.”
–Wilson, when examining a burnt Wooden Chair/Stool
“Aww, it's over.”
–Willow, when examining a burnt Wooden Chair/Stool
“Chair looks burnt and sad.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a burnt Wooden Chair/Stool
“Oh well.”
–Wendy, when examining a burnt Wooden Chair/Stool
“YOU CAN HAVE IT NOW, FLESHLINGS”
–WX-78, when examining a burnt Wooden Chair/Stool
“Can't we have any nice things?”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a burnt Wooden Chair/Stool
“It's just so sad...”
–Woodie, when examining a burnt Wooden Chair/Stool
“Better that way.”
–Maxwell, when examining a burnt Wooden Chair/Stool
“The göds hath nö need för chairs.”
–Wigfrid, when examining a burnt Wooden Chair/Stool
“We thought we smelled burning.”
–Webber, when examining a burnt Wooden Chair/Stool
“Chair brûlé.”
–Warly, when examining a burnt Wooden Chair/Stool
“Oh no!”
–Wormwood, when examining a burnt Wooden Chair/Stool
“I ain't one to sit around anyway.”
–Winona, when examining a burnt Wooden Chair/Stool
“I see this seat's been taken.”
–Wortox, when examining a burnt Wooden Chair/Stool
“Aww...”
–Wurt, when examining a burnt Wooden Chair/Stool
“That's why we should never play with matches.”
–Walter, when examining a burnt Wooden Chair/Stool
“Its chairing days are done.”
–Wanda, when examining a burnt Wooden Chair/Stool

Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Wooden Chair and Wooden Stool were introduced in the Host of Horrors update.
If the chair you are sitting on lights up, your character will say “This is fine.” Some characters say this line differently, but for the most part they are the same. This is a reference to a popular comic strip from the webcomic Gunshow.
“This is fine.”
–Wilson
“This is great!”
–Willow
“Wolfgang is fine.”
–Wolfgang
“This is fine. Really.”
–Wendy
“THIS IS FINE”
–WX-78
“This is unacceptable.”
–Wickerbottom
“This is fine, eh.”
–Woodie
“This is fine.”
–Maxwell
“This is fine.”
–Wigfrid
“We are fine.”
–Webber
“C'est bon.”
–Warly
“This fine”
–Wormwood
“This is fine.”
–Winona
“This is fine.”
–Wortox
“This not fine!!”
–Wurt
“This is fine.”
–Walter
“This is fine.”
–Wanda

They can be crafted with 1 [[Cut Stone]] and 2 [[Rope]] and require an upgraded Sawhorse with [[Moon Glass Saw Blade]] to prototype. {{clear}} ==Sanctum Relic== {{Object Infobox |name = Sanctum Relic |image = Sanctum_Relic_Stool.png |biome = [[Sanctum]] |spawnCode = "vault_stool" }} The '''Sanctum Relic''' as a stool can be found in a [[Sanctum#Playbill|Playbill room]] in the [[Sanctum]]. {{clear}} == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Furniture Skins|Belongings}} ===Wooden Chair Skins=== * The '''Woven - Distinguished Battered Wooden Chair''' Issued for free on the eve of Halloween in 2023.
{{SkinInfo |image = Cozy Wooden Chair Icon.png |rarity = Woven - Distinguished |collection = Decorator's Collection |name = Cozy Wooden Chair |description = This very chair was handcrafted for your derrière. }} {{SkinInfo |image = Four-Leg Clover Chair Icon.png |rarity = Woven - Distinguished |collection = Fantasmical Collection |name = Four-Leg Clover Chair |description = Plant your lucky rear right here. }} {{SkinInfo |image = Battered Wooden Chair Icon.png |rarity = Woven - Distinguished |collection = Hallowed Nighst Collection |name = Battered Wooden Chair |description = This chair's constant squeaks and creaks will drive you batty. }} {{SkinInfo |image = Parlor Wooden Chair Icon.png |rarity = Woven - Distinguished |collection = Parlor's Collection |name = Parlor Wooden Chair |description = A luxurious seat for the most discerning of rumps. }} {{SkinInfo |image = Cawnival Ribboned Chair Icon.png |rarity = Woven - Distinguished |collection = Cawnival Collection |name =Cawnival Ribboned Chair |description = Winning is hard work. You deserve a rest. }} {{SkinInfo |image = Briarwood Chair Icon.png |rarity = Woven - Distinguished |collection = Rose Collection |name = Briarwood Chair |description = A thorny throne for your weary rear. }}
===Wooden Stool Skins=== * The '''Woven - Distinguished Cobwebby Stool''' Issued for free on the eve of Halloween in 2023.
{{SkinInfo |image = Cozy Wooden Stool Icon.png |rarity = Woven - Distinguished |collection = Decorator's Collection |name = Cozy Wooden Stool |description = A comfy seat to rest your feet. }} {{SkinInfo |image = Toadstool Icon.png |rarity = Woven - Distinguished |collection = Fantasmical Collection |name = Toadstool |description = A toadstool you can sit on. }} {{SkinInfo |image = Cobwebby Stool Icon.png |rarity = Woven - Distinguished |collection = Hallowed Nighst Collection |name = Cobwebby Stool |description = Why not lay your tired bones to rest on this spooky seat? }} {{SkinInfo |image = Parlor Wooden Stool Icon.png |rarity = Woven - Distinguished |collection = Parlor's Collection |name = Parlor Wooden Stool |description = Careful not to get too comfortable. }} {{SkinInfo |image = Cawnival Stool Icon.png |rarity = Woven - Distinguished |collection = Cawnival Collection |name =Cawnival Stool |description = Step right up... and sit down. }} {{SkinInfo |image = Rosewood Stool Icon.png |rarity = Woven - Distinguished |collection = Rose Collection |name = Rosewood Stool |description = Rest your tired behind on this beautiful bloom. }}

== {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia == * The Wooden Chair and Wooden Stool were introduced in the ''[[From Beyond#Host of Horrors|Host of Horrors]]'' update. * If the chair you are sitting on lights up, your character will say “This is fine.” Some characters say this line differently, but for the most part they are the same. This is a reference to a [https://gunshowcomic.com/648 popular comic strip] from the webcomic ''Gunshow''. {{Quotes |walter=This is fine. |wanda=This is fine. |warly=C'est bon. |wigfrid=This is fine. |maxwell=This is fine. |webber=We are fine. |wendy=This is fine. Really. |wickerbottom=This is unacceptable. |willow=This is great! |wilson=This is fine. |winona=This is fine. |wolfgang=Wolfgang is fine. |woodie=This is fine, eh. |wormwood=This fine |wortox=This is
